commands.review_summary:
The branch makes owning context engines run before native harness compaction, adds a marked Codex secondary native follow-up, clears stale projection metadata before that follow-up, and adds focused regression tests.

PR surface: Source +139, Tests +136. Total +275 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the narrowed bug: current main source shows queued compaction can return the Codex non-manual native result before an owning context engine runs, and the PR body reports a live Discord reproduction of that failure. I did not rerun the live Discord lane in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review remains because the open blocker is final-head runtime proof plus maintainer ownership of a session-state-sensitive compaction change, not a narrow code repair.

target.title: Fix context-engine compaction ownership for Codex sessions
target.body:
## Summary

- keep owning context-engine compaction primary for queued budget compaction when a Codex/native harness is also selected
- request Codex native `thread/compact/start` only as a bounded secondary follow-up after successful owning context-engine compaction
- clear stale Codex thread-bootstrap projection metadata before that native follow-up mutates the bound thread
- add focused regression coverage for the queued handoff and the real Codex app-server bridge path

Refs #90496. This addresses the live-reproduced context-engine/native-compaction breakage from the issue, but it does not claim to close every reported symptom around provider 4xxs, scheduled-session metadata, or automatic transcript rotation policy.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Budget auto-compaction can be short-circuited by the Codex app-server native path before an owning context engine compacts the session.

Real environment tested: Live Discord lane using a Convex-leased `discord` credential, gateway started from this branch before the follow-up bridge repair, and a proof context engine registered with `ownsCompaction: true`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: Sent a real Discord marker mention, verified the SUT bot reply, seeded the Discord channel session with Codex/native harness metadata, then invoked queued budget compaction for that session.

Evidence after fix: The live Discord run observed the marker reply and compaction returned `ok:true`, `compacted:true`, `reason:"proof-context-engine-compacted"`, with `markerWritten:true`. The primary context-engine result won over the Codex-native result.

Observed result after fix: The owning context engine performed the compaction first. The Codex app-server native path remained secondary and bounded.

What was not tested live: A real production Codex provider `provider_error_4xx`, scheduled/reminder stale model metadata recreation, and a new automatic transcript-rotation product policy for genuinely unrecoverable compaction.

## Secondary Codex bridge proof

After review feedback, the secondary native path no longer reuses the plain budget trigger. The queued runner marks the secondary call with `nativeCompactionRequest: "after_context_engine"`; the Codex harness converts that marker into an internal bridge option; and the real Codex app-server bridge sends `thread/compact/start` for that marked budget request instead of returning `reason:"non_manual_trigger"`.

The bridge test also verifies stale thread-bootstrap projection metadata is cleared before native Codex compaction starts, so the next turn reprojects context instead of trusting a pre-compaction projection marker.

## Regression proof

On current `origin/main` at `80f1ae6ffe`, the same live Discord proof reproduced the narrowed failure: Discord marker observed, reset clean, but budget compaction returned `compacted:false`, `reason:"codex app-server owns automatic compaction"`, and `markerWritten:false`.

## Verification

- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` passed with no accepted/actionable findings after the secondary Codex bridge repair.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compact.hooks.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/compact.test.ts` passed, 68/68 agent tests and 19/19 Codex bridge tests.
- `git diff --check` passed.
target.author: joshavant
